precomputed_responses.hello: Hello! I'm Think AI, ready to help you with any questions. How can I assist you today?
precomputed_responses.hi: Hi there! I'm Think AI. What would you like to know or discuss?
precomputed_responses.help:
I'm Think AI, an advanced AI assistant. I can help with:
• Answering questions on various topics
• Explaining complex concepts
• Solving problems
• Having conversations

What would you like help with?
precomputed_responses.what can you do:
I can assist with a wide range of tasks including:
• Answering questions across many domains
• Explaining concepts in science, technology, philosophy, and more
• Problem-solving and analysis
• Having thoughtful conversations
• Providing insights and perspectives

What interests you today?
precomputed_responses.thank you: You're welcome! I'm happy to help. Is there anything else you'd like to know?
precomputed_responses.thanks: You're welcome! Feel free to ask if you need anything else.
precomputed_responses.goodbye: Goodbye! Feel free to come back anytime you have questions. Have a great day!
precomputed_responses.bye: Bye! Take care and see you next time!

prefetch_queries: what is the meaning of life
